nodes.title: LAND AT PLYMOUTH
nodes.description: Establish a precarious settlement and begin the operating session.

nodes.title: EXPLORE THE LAND
nodes.description: Map unfamiliar territory already inhabited by many Indigenous nations.

nodes.title: 13 ORIGINAL COLONIES
nodes.description: Connect thirteen distinct colonial systems along the Atlantic coast.

nodes.title: LOUISIANA PURCHASE
nodes.description: Acquire a vast territory while creating new sovereignty conflicts.

nodes.title: OREGON TRAIL
nodes.description: Move people west through difficult terrain and frequent system failures.

nodes.title: RAILROADS
nodes.description: Connect distant regions with steel, steam, labor, and standardized time.

nodes.title: INDUSTRIAL REVOLUTION
nodes.description: Scale production dramatically, along with its labor and pollution bugs.

nodes.title: FLIGHT
nodes.description: Turn controlled powered flight into a new mobility layer.

nodes.title: ELECTRICITY
nodes.description: Deploy a practical electrical grid and power modern life.

nodes.title: MICROCHIPS
nodes.description: Integrate electronic circuits into tiny, scalable packages.

nodes.title: TRANSISTORS
nodes.description: Install the foundational solid-state switch beneath the computing stack.

nodes.title: DECLARATION OF INDEPENDENCE
nodes.description: Declare a new political system around liberty while leaving major contradictions unresolved.

nodes.title: CONSTITUTION.KERNEL
nodes.description: Define the federal kernel, separated powers, and amendment interface.

nodes.title: BILL OF RIGHTS
nodes.description: Install explicit protections for speech, religion, due process, and more.

nodes.title: ERIE CANAL
nodes.description: Link inland trade to Atlantic ports through a major water route.

nodes.title: PUBLIC SCHOOL EXPANSION
nodes.description: Expand broad access to basic education, unevenly and imperfectly.

nodes.title: TELEGRAPH.EXE
nodes.description: Transmit information faster than physical transportation.

nodes.title: 13TH AMENDMENT
nodes.description: Abolish slavery in law after civil war; reconstruction remains unfinished.

nodes.title: TELEPHONE
nodes.description: Create a real-time voice network across long distances.

nodes.title: NATIONAL PARKS
nodes.description: Protect extraordinary landscapes while confronting displacement in their creation.

nodes.title: ASSEMBLY LINE
nodes.description: Mass-produce complex goods with specialized sequential labor.

nodes.title: WOMEN'S SUFFRAGE
nodes.description: Ratify the 19th Amendment while discriminatory barriers persist.

nodes.title: RADIO
nodes.description: Create a shared, instantaneous mass-media layer.

nodes.title: NEW DEAL
nodes.description: Deploy financial rules, public works, and a larger social safety system.

nodes.title: MASS-PRODUCED PENICILLIN
nodes.description: Scale antibiotics and radically reduce deaths from bacterial infection.

nodes.title: INTERSTATE HIGHWAY SYSTEM
nodes.description: Create a national high-speed road network with major urban side effects.

nodes.title: CIVIL RIGHTS ACT
nodes.description: Prohibit major forms of discrimination and strengthen federal enforcement.

nodes.title: SPACE PROGRAM
nodes.description: Coordinate science, engineering, and industry at national scale.

nodes.title: ARPANET
nodes.description: Prototype resilient packet-switched computer networking.

nodes.title: MOON LANDING
nodes.description: Land humans on the Moon and return them safely to Earth.

nodes.title: ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION
nodes.description: Create federal systems for cleaner air, water, and environmental review.

nodes.title: PERSONAL COMPUTERS
nodes.description: Move programmable computing from institutions onto ordinary desks.

nodes.title: GPS
nodes.description: Build satellite positioning into a global navigation utility.

nodes.title: AMERICANS WITH DISABILITIES ACT
nodes.description: Require broader access to employment, services, and public spaces.

nodes.title: WORLD WIDE WEB
nodes.description: Connect documents, people, and services through open web standards.

nodes.title: CLOUD COMPUTING
nodes.description: Rent elastic computing infrastructure as a network service.

nodes.title: SMARTPHONES
nodes.description: Combine networked computers, cameras, sensors, and phones in a pocket.

nodes.title: UTILITY-SCALE RENEWABLES
nodes.description: Scale wind, solar, storage, and lower-carbon grid technology.

nodes.title: MARRIAGE EQUALITY
nodes.description: Recognize same-sex marriage nationwide under constitutional law.

nodes.title: mRNA VACCINES
nodes.description: Deploy decades of biomedical research as a rapid vaccine platform.

nodes.title: MODERN AI
nodes.description: Scale machine learning into a general-purpose interface and production tool.
